---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement for PropIQ
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit from it?

## Proposed Solution
How do you think this could be implemented?

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Context
Any mockups, references, or additional information.
